productDisplayName: Puma Men Generation Black Polo Tshirt
description: Composition Black T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a grey spread cotton collar, short sleeves, three-button chest placket in grey, puma Leaping cat embroidered on the left chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron With a sporty touch, this T-shirt from puma makes for a perfect casual wear. The contrast cotton collar adds to this cotton tee's regal style. Team it with jeans and suede shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
